Notes: UWO's 15th straight win over UWP...UWO overcame a 30-27 halftime deficit by
outscoring UWP, 20-2, in the third quarter...UWP missed all 10 of its shots
from the field in the third quarter...UWO's Rueth came off the bench to total
17 points, 5 rebounds & 3 steals...UWP was just 2 of 14 on 3-point shooting.
Game.Officials: Mark Gassmann,  Ron Quirk,  Darla Brendemuehl
